prompt: Match the icon colors to their corresponding year's color.
prompt_refined:
Edit image 1. Modify the color of each icon in the top row to match the color of its corresponding year circle located directly below it. Specifically:
- Recolor the person icon in the top-left to match the green of the '2020' circle.
- Recolor the bar chart icon in the top-center-left to match the orange of the '2021' circle.
- Recolor the flask icon in the top-center-right to match the red of the '2022' circle.
- Recolor the globe icon in the top-right to match the blue of the '2023' circle.
